method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Tighten conceptual precision and reduce drift next run.

finalOutput.artistThinking: Creating 'Memory Under Machine Pressure' has pushed me to explore the tension between human experiences and the relentless demands of technology. I aim to evoke emotions that resonate deeply, using layers to symbolize the complexity of memory. This piece is not just about the visuals; it's a commentary on how machines shape our lives and memories.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The concept stems from observing how our realities are increasingly mediated by technology, often leaving our authentic memories in the shadows. I draw on personal rituals that ground me, contrasting them against the coldness of machinery.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: lyrical, emotionally charged, symbolic. Primary medium language: digital collage with painterly textures. Core motifs: memory, tension, ritual. Arc context: Arc "Soft Catastrophes" step 3/4. Visual anchor directive: strong focal anchor with strong focal anchor. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: human meaning under machine pressure; counterpoint with human meaning under machine pressure. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: flat lighting. Technique emphasis: structured layering + structured layering; avoid drifting into safe defaults. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Soft Catastrophes step 3/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
